description_long: This object consists of four classic ring-shaped donuts, each with a distinct icing color and pattern. The donuts have a soft, golden-brown base, with three featuring smooth, glossy icing in white, pink, and chocolate brown, and one donut displaying a striped pattern of chocolate and pink icing. The icing appears thick and slightly drippy, covering the top surface of each donut and leaving the sides partially exposed. The donuts are arranged closely together, with one slightly elevated above the others, suggesting a casual, freshly-served presentation. No additional toppings, packaging, or branding are visible, and the donuts rest on an undefined, neutral surface.
description: A group of four ring-shaped donuts with glossy white, pink, and chocolate icings, some with striped patterns and no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: Three donuts are seen from above, showing white, pink, and chocolate icings, with one donut elevated and partially overlapping the others.
description_view_1: All four donuts are visible from a side angle, highlighting the thick, glossy icing and the golden-brown sides of the donuts.
description_view_2: The striped chocolate and pink icing is most prominent, with the pink-iced donut separated from the group.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the group, emphasizing the striped donut and the smooth, glossy surfaces of the icings.
attribute_icing_type: Smooth, glossy icing in chocolate, white, and pink, with one donut featuring a striped chocolate and pink glaze.
attribute_placement_location: unwrapped and resting on a neutral, undefined surface
